text: Every day, I follow a consistent routine that keeps me organized. I wake up at 6 a.m., drink a glass of water, and go for a 20-minute jog. After a quick shower, I have a light breakfast and prepare for work. I usually start my job at 9 a.m., responding to emails and completing projects until lunch. In the afternoon, I focus on meetings or collaborative tasks. In the evening, I unwind by reading a book or watching a show. Before bed, I do 10 minutes of stretching. This structure helps me stay productive and balanced.
